name: ‚ÄãFreshbooks
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What FreshBooks Does

FreshBooks is built for agency owners who are still managing their finances in spreadsheets. While Vcita focuses on payments and basic billing, FreshBooks is full accounting software designed to handle the complete financial picture. It tracks billable hours, generates professional invoices, automates recurring billing, manages expenses, and provides robust reporting so you can see exactly how profitable each client or project is. FreshBooks also integrates with banks and payment processors, making reconciliation easier, and supports multiple currencies for agencies working with international clients.

Source: Freshbooks

‚ÄãKey Features

  • ‚ÄãAutomated Invoicing: Set it up once, and FreshBooks sends the bill every month, including automatic late fees.
  • ‚ÄãProject Profitability: See exactly how much you are spending on contractors vs. what the client is paying you.
  • ‚ÄãTime Tracking: A built-in timer that flows directly onto the client‚Äôs invoice, ensuring every billable minute is captured.

‚ÄãBenefits of FreshBooks

  • ‚ÄãFaster Payments: Agencies using FreshBooks often get paid faster than with Vcita 
  • ‚ÄãTax-Time Ease: Everything is categorized and ready for your accountant, saving you a massive headache.
  • Clear Profit Visibility: Track client and project profitability in real time, helping agencies make informed decisions about pricing and resource allocation.

‚ÄãPricing

  • ‚ÄãLite: $8.40/month 
  • ‚ÄãPlus: $15.20/month 
  • ‚ÄãPremium: $26/month 

Customized pricing is also available. Discounts are available with annual billing.

‚ÄãPros

‚Äã‚úÖ Extremely easy to use for ‚Äúnon-accountants‚Äù.

‚úÖ Excellent mobile app for tracking expenses and sending invoices on the go.

‚ÄãCons

‚Äãüö´ Very limited sales CRM features (no pipelines or lead tracking).

üö´ No marketing fulfillment tools.

‚Äç

What Customers Say

‚ÄúFreshBooks is extremely easy to use, even for someone without an accounting background. The interface is clean, intuitive, and saves me time when creating invoices, tracking expenses, or managing projects. Despite being user-friendly, it still offers a strong set of features like time tracking, recurring invoices, and payment reminders. It strikes the perfect balance between simplicity and functionality, which makes it a great tool for small businesses.‚Äù

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
